markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 20, 2026 6 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 76.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 76.99° on Jun 20, 2026 at 6am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Batsomi Marobela wins the Kumase vs Marobela professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Africa Round after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Kumase vs Marobela professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Africa Round after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Batsomi Marobela win the Kumase vs Marobela: Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Africa Round match?
